classification: build scaffold; unresolved inputs are deliberate blockers, not inferred vendor sources

hardware.reason: Portable Neptune Edge RTL is present, but a revision-matched ADI board top level, constraints, generated Xilinx IP, and routed timing baseline have not been established.

fsbl.reason: FSBL source and BSP must be generated from the same resolved hardware export as the bitstream.

uboot.reason: A P210-specific U-Boot source commit, defconfig, and SD-only environment have not been validated on hardware.

linux.reason: A Linux source commit and P210 device-tree source matched to the selected AD9361 HDL have not been validated.

rootfs.reason: A minimal rootfs generator, configuration, and cross-toolchain have not been selected and locked.

control_daemon.reason: The USB control and UDP data services are source-tested, but their clean source identity, ARM build inputs, target service configuration, and runtime device contacts are not yet locked.

calibration.reason: Integrity-checked revision storage and explicit uncalibrated bypass defaults exist; no serial-bound, device-measured calibration is available.

protocol.reason: Canonical Edge v1 schemas, bindings, registers, and golden vectors exist, but their final clean-commit identity and physical-image install stage are not yet locked.
